title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS provides AI coding agents with up-to-date documentation, best practices, tested procedures, and guardrails for working with AWS services. It includes Agent Skills as markdown runbooks, plugin configuration through MCP, and integrates with services like Lambda and API Gateway. The toolkit improves agent success rates and reduces errors through domain-specific knowledge.
